name: Obstacle Avoidance Path Planning Study
description: A robotics engineer must program a robot arm to navigate through a cluttered workspace using the ZMQ Remote API in CoppeliaSim. Create at least 4 cuboid obstacles that partially obstruct a direct path between the start and goal regions. Plan and execute a collision-free path of at least 10 waypoints from the start to the goal region while avoiding obstacles. Export a CSV report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/obstacle_path.csv with columns: waypoint_id, target_x, target_y, target_z, actual_x, actual_y, actual_z, min_clearance_m, and collision_free (1 or 0). Export a JSON summary to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/path_planning_report.json including total_waypoints, collision_free_count, total_path_length_m, min_clearance_m, obstacle_count, start_xyz, goal_xyz, and path_success (boolean). Login: username=ga, password=password123.
